ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, recall, precision) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., trained, deployed, retired) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration of the training process in hours */,
  "last_trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last trained the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data set */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the data set belongs to */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the data set */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data set */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data set in MB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data set (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data set was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the data set */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data set */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data set has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed_date" TEXT /* Last accessed date of the data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_preprocessing" (
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessing step */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set being preprocessed */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the preprocessing step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the preprocessing step */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the preprocessing step */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the preprocessing step was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the preprocessing step (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the preprocessing step */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the preprocessing step */,
  "execution_duration" REAL /* Duration of the preprocessing step in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preprocessing_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the evaluation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the evaluation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the evaluation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the role */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last active date of the user on the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity being accessed (e.g., project, model, data set) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the entity was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confusion_matrices" (
  "confusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confusion matrix */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the confusion matrix belongs to */,
  "true_positive" INTEGER /* Number of true positive predictions */,
  "true_negative" INTEGER /* Number of true negative predictions */,
  "false_positive" INTEGER /* Number of false positive predictions */,
  "false_negative" INTEGER /* Number of false negative predictions */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the confusion matrix */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the confusion matrix */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the confusion matrix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confusion_matrices_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "test_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data set */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set the test data belongs to */,
  "test_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the test data set */,
  "test_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the test data set in MB */,
  "test_set_format" TEXT /* Format of the test data set (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the test data set was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the test data set */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the test data set */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the test data set has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed_date" TEXT /* Last accessed date of the test data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)
